hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$f" == *apps/server/src/db/migrations/0* ]]; then echo '{"permissionDecision": "ask", "reason": "Modifying an existing Effect SQL migration can break deployments"}'; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$f" == *apps/server/src/db/migrations/* ]]; then if [[ "$f" =~ [0-9]{4}_[a-z_]+\.ts$ ]]; then echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; else echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Migration must match NNNN_description.ts (e.g. 0002_add_contacts.ts)"}'; fi; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$f" == *.env ]] && [[ "$f" != *.env.example ]]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Never read .env or credentials. Use Config.string() in Effect code."}'; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force-with-lease)'; then echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force|-f)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Force push is destructive. Use --force-with-lease or ask the user first."}'; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi

jq -r '[.tool_input.subagent_type // "general", .tool_input.description // "no description"] | @tsv' | while read -r type desc; do echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Agent: $type | $desc" >> /Users/guillem/programacio/codi/autonom/batuda/.claude/agent-audit.log; done; echo '{"decision": "approve"}'

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx || "$f" == *.json ]]; then biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched "$f" 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$f" == *.md ]]; then dprint fmt "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$f" == *packages/domain/src/schema/*.ts ]] && [[ "$f" != *.test.ts ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Domain schema changed. Check if an Effect SQL migration is needed in apps/server/src/db/migrations/"}'; fi; true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$f" == *apps/server/src/db/migrations/* ]]; then echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $f" >> /Users/guillem/programacio/codi/autonom/batuda/.claude/migration-audit.log; fi; true

cd /Users/guillem/programacio/codi/autonom/batuda && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo '{"systemMessage": "TypeScript files changed. Run: pnpm check-types"}' || true
